query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalRows,
       COUNT(DISTINCT sheetRowNumber) AS distinctSheetRowNumbers,
       SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nullSheetRowNumbers
FROM products
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01';
SELECT sheetRowNumber, COUNT(*) AS rowCount
FROM products
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01'
GROUP BY sheetRowNumber
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY rowCount DESC, sheetRowNumber
LIMIT 20;

       SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nullSheetRowNumbers

SELECT sheetRowNumber, COUNT(*) AS rowCount
FROM products
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01'
GROUP BY sheetRowNumber
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY rowCount DESC, sheetRowNumber
LIMIT 20;
